Class Topic

java.lang.Object
graph.Topic
public class Topic extends Object
Represents a topic in the pub/sub system. Subscribers can subscribe to the topic and publishers can publish messages.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final String
    name
    Topic name.
    final List<Agent>
    pubs
    Publishers allowed to publish to this topic.
    final List<Agent>
    subs
    Subscribers listening to this topic.

  • Field Details

    • name

      public final String name
      Topic name.

    • subs

      public final List<Agent> subs
      Subscribers listening to this topic.

    • pubs

      public final List<Agent> pubs
      Publishers allowed to publish to this topic.

  • Method Details

    • subscribe

      public void subscribe(Agent agent)
      Register an Agent as subscriber.
      Parameters:
      agent - subscriber agent

    • unsubscribe

      public void unsubscribe(Agent agent)
      Remove an Agent from subscribers list.
      Parameters:
      agent - subscriber to remove

    • publish

      public void publish(Message msg)
      Publish a message to all subscribers. Each subscriber receives callback().
      Parameters:
      msg - message to publish

    • addPublisher

      public void addPublisher(Agent agent)
      Add an Agent to publishers list.
      Parameters:
      agent - publisher agent

    • getLastMessage

      public Message getLastMessage()

    • removePublisher

      public void removePublisher(Agent agent)
      Remove an Agent from publishers list.
      Parameters:
      agent - publisher to remove
